sentences.arabic: يَتَبَوَّأُ فَنُّ الْمَقَامَاتِ مَنْزِلَةً فَرِيدَةً وَسَامِيَةً فِي سِجِلِّ النَّثْرِ الْعَرَبِيِّ الْأَصِيلِ.
sentences.translation: Umijeće makama zauzima jedinstven i uzvišen položaj u analima izvorne arapske proze.
sentences.translationEn: The art of Maqamat occupies a unique and lofty position in the records of authentic Arabic prose.

sentences.arabic: إِذْ يَمْزُجُ هَذَا الْفَنُّ بَيْنَ بَرَاعَةِ الْحَكْيِ وَسِحْرِ الْبَيَانِ فِي نَسِيجٍ لُغَوِيٍّ مُبْهِرٍ لِلْعُقُولِ.
sentences.translation: Ova umjetnost spaja vještinu pripovijedanja i magiju izražavanja u jezičko tkivo koje zadivljuje umove.
sentences.translationEn: This art blends the skill of storytelling and the magic of eloquence into a linguistic fabric that dazzles the mind.

sentences.arabic: تَقُومُ هَذِهِ الْحِكَايَاتُ الشَّيِّقَةُ عَلَى شَخْصِيَّةِ بَطَلٍ جَوَّالٍ ذِي ذَكَاءٍ وَقَّادٍ.
sentences.translation: Ove zanimljive priče temelje se na liku lutajućeg junaka oštroumne inteligencije.
sentences.translationEn: These engaging tales are based on the character of a wandering hero with a brilliant intelligence.

sentences.arabic: هَذَا الْبَطَلُ يَمْتَلِكُ نَاصِيَةَ اللُّغَةِ وَيَعْرِفُ كَيْفَ يُطَوِّعُ أَلْفَاظَهَا بِسُهُولَةٍ.
sentences.translation: Taj junak vlada jezikom i zna kako s lakoćom oblikovati njegove riječi.
sentences.translationEn: This hero masters the language and knows how to mold its words with ease.

sentences.arabic: هُوَ يَسْتَخْدِمُ فَصَاحَتَهُ الْفَائِقَةَ لِيَجْتَازَ مَصَاعِبَ الْحَيَاةِ وَتَقَلُّبَاتِ الدَّهْرِ الْقَاسِيَةِ.
sentences.translation: On koristi svoju vrhunsku rječitost kako bi prebrodio životne poteškoće i surove prevrate sudbine.
sentences.translationEn: He uses his supreme eloquence to overcome life's difficulties and the harsh fluctuations of fate.

sentences.arabic: إِنَّ السَّجْعَ الْمُتَوَازِنَ فِي مَقَامَاتِ الْهَمَذَانِيِّ لَيْسَ مُجَرَّدَ تَكَلُّفٍ لَفْظِيٍّ.
sentences.translation: Uravnotežena proza u rimi (sedž') u Hamadhanijevim makamama nije samo puka verbalna usiljenost.
sentences.translationEn: The balanced rhymed prose (Saj') in the Maqamat of al-Hamadhani is not merely verbal affectation.

sentences.arabic: بَلْ هُوَ مِرْآةٌ صَافِيَةٌ تَعْكِسُ ثَقَافَةً عَصْرِيَّةً زَاخِرَةً بِالْمَعَارِفِ وَالْفُنُونِ الْمُتَنَوِّعَةِ.
sentences.translation: Naprotiv, to je bistro ogledalo koje odražava savremenu kulturu prepunu različitih znanja i umjetnosti.
sentences.translationEn: Rather, it is a clear mirror reflecting a contemporary culture rich in diverse knowledge and arts.

sentences.arabic: كُلُّ مَقَامَةٍ تُعَدُّ لَوْحَةً فَنِّيَّةً نَادِرَةً تُرْسَمُ بِرِيشَةِ الْكَلِمَاتِ الْمُخْتَارَةِ بِعِنَايَةٍ.
sentences.translation: Svaka makama se smatra rijetkom umjetničkom slikom naslikanom kistom pažljivo odabranih riječi.
sentences.translationEn: Each Maqama is considered a rare artistic painting drawn with the brush of carefully chosen words.

sentences.arabic: حَيْثُ يَتَلَاعَبُ الْكَاتِبُ بِالْأَلْفَاظِ تَلَاعُبَ الصَّائِغِ الْمَاهِرِ بِأَغْلَى الْجَوَاهِرِ وَالْيَوَاقِيتِ.
sentences.translation: Tu se pisac igra riječima kao što se vješti draguljar igra najskupljim draguljima i rubinima.
sentences.translationEn: Here, the writer plays with words as a skilled jeweler plays with the most expensive gems and rubies.

sentences.arabic: هُوَ يَسْتَخْرِجُ مِنْ مَكَامِنِ لُغَةِ الضَّادِ دُرَرَاً بَهِيَّةً وَنَفَائِسَ لَا تَقْدُرُ بِثَمَنٍ.
sentences.translation: On iz skrivenih riznica arapskog jezika izvlači sjajne bisere i neprocjenjive dragocjenosti.
sentences.translationEn: He extracts from the hidden depths of the Arabic language splendid pearls and priceless treasures.

sentences.arabic: وَلَا يَقْتَصِرُ هَذَا الْإِبْدَاعُ عَلَى الزُّخْرُفِ اللَّفْظِيِّ الْخَارِجِيِّ فَقَطْ.
sentences.translation: Ova kreativnost nije ograničena samo na vanjski verbalni ukras.
sentences.translationEn: This creativity is not limited only to external verbal decoration.

sentences.arabic: بَلْ يَمْتَدُّ لِيَشْمَلَ نَقْداً لَطِيفاً لِأَحْوَالِ الْمُجْتَمَعِ وَسُلُوكِيَّاتِ النَّاسِ الْعَامَّةِ.
sentences.translation: Ona se širi i na suptilnu kritiku društvenih prilika i općeg ponašanja ljudi.
sentences.translationEn: It extends to include a subtle critique of social conditions and the general behaviors of people.

sentences.arabic: إِنَّ الْغَوْصَ فِي أَعْمَاقِ هَذَا الْأَدَبِ يَتَطَلَّبُ ذَائِقَةً لُغَوِيَّةً رَفِيعَةً جِدًّا.
sentences.translation: Zaroniti u dubine ove književnosti zahtijeva veoma visok jezički ukus.
sentences.translationEn: Diving into the depths of this literature requires a very high linguistic taste.

sentences.arabic: فَالْمَقَامَةُ هِيَ اخْتِبَارٌ حَقِيقِيٌّ لِقُدْرَةِ الْأَدِيبِ عَلَى التَّجْدِيدِ وَالِابْتِكَارِ.
sentences.translation: Makama je, zapravo, pravi test književnikove sposobnosti za obnovu i inovaciju.
sentences.translationEn: The Maqama is a true test of the writer's ability to renew and innovate.

sentences.arabic: وَبِذَلِكَ، بَقِيَتْ هَذِهِ النُّصُوصُ مَنَارَةً شَامِخَةً لِكُلِّ عُشَّاقِ الْفَصَاحَةِ وَالْبَيَانِ.
sentences.translation: Tako su ovi tekstovi ostali uzvišen svjetionik za sve ljubitelje rječitosti i jasnog izražavanja.
sentences.translationEn: Thus, these texts have remained a towering lighthouse for all lovers of eloquence and clarity.
